title: ottleya strigosa
intro: Ottleya strigosa, also known as the desert broom or desert broom cholla, is a type of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ottleya strigosa include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, as well as acting as a natural diuretic. Ottleya strigosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
